title: Cozy Turkish Fish Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Turkish dish featuring fish, long-fermentation-dough, and dried oregano, cooked to perfection on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the salt block in the oven at 400 degrees for 30 minutes.
Roll out the long-fermentation-dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Place the dough on the preheated salt block and cook for 5 minutes on each side.
In a bowl, mix together the mustard, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish fillets to the bowl and coat with the mustard mixture.
Place the fish fillets on the cooked dough and sprinkle with dried oregano.
Pour the water over the fish and dough, making sure that the dough is covered.
Cover the salt block with aluminum foil and cook in the oven at 375 degrees for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
